about.title: About
paragraphs: After working in investment for six years, I quit my job to follow my passion to code.
I attended Makers Academy, an amazing 12 week bootcamp in London. And got my first job as a full stack developer. In 2018 I moved to Vancouver. I build apps using Javascript.

items.title: Full Stack Developer — Cordant Group, London
items.subtitle: MAR 2017 - JUL 2018
items.description: Member of an Agile Development team, involved in a Digital Transformation Programme, modernising On-Premises, Off-the-shelf systems with SaaS, and building Cloud Native Applications. Developed full stack web apps and business services using microservices architecture &databases.

items.title: Investment Consultant — Aon, London
items.subtitle: SEPT 2010 - OCT 2016
items.description: Developed and delivered successful investment solutions for a range of clients, including 3 FTSE 100 companies. Managed day-to-day client relationships and co-ordinated both project and ad-hoc work within client team. Built and improved Excel models for analysing the investment market. Produced a weekly market analysis report read by clients and colleagues globally.

items.title: Web Development Bootcamp — Makers Academy, London
items.subtitle: NOV  2016 - FEB 2017
items.description: 12 week intensive coding bootcamp with focus on best practice, TDD, software craftsmanship. Self-led learning through group projects (e.g. an app to connect musicians, CSV processor), workshops, weekly challenges and pair programming.

items.title: MSc Quantitative Finance & Financial Engineering (Merit) — Manchester Business School, UK
BSc Mathematics with Finance (1st Class) — University of Manchester, UK
